discovery_sources.title: Acme founder call - April 2026
discovery_sources.description: Founder debrief after three customer interviews.

raw_payload_excerpt.summary: Founder shared repeated pain point notes from customer calls.

discovery_sources.title: Acme onboarding review
discovery_sources.description: Operator notes from onboarding support review.
discovery_sources.provenance_note: Operator meeting notes from onboarding review.

raw_payload_excerpt.summary: Support requests still cluster around first workflow setup.

evidence_targets.evidence_statement: Three pilot customers independently described the same workflow bottleneck.
evidence_targets.excerpt: Customers named the same painful spreadsheet handoff.
evidence_targets.assumption_statement: The team may be solving a recurring, not isolated, customer pain point.

evidence_targets.evidence_statement: New users still require manual onboarding support after week two.
evidence_targets.excerpt: Support tickets cluster around first workflow setup.
evidence_targets.assumption_statement: The onboarding flow is not yet self-serve enough to scale.

domain_scores.rationale: Interview evidence suggests repeated customer pain across multiple pilots.
domain_scores.key_gap: Need repeat-usage proof after pilot onboarding.
domain_scores.next_action: Collect structured retention and repeat-usage evidence.

domain_scores.rationale: Onboarding friction is visible, but the supporting evidence still needs review.
domain_scores.key_gap: Need reviewed evidence on activation and onboarding drop-off.
domain_scores.next_action: Review onboarding support notes and instrument activation milestones.

capital_readiness_drafts.readiness_rationale: Demand evidence is improving, but the company still needs reviewed product and retention evidence.
blocking_gaps: Reviewed retention evidence is still missing
capital_readiness_drafts.support_routing_recommendation: Route product onboarding support before capital introductions.
capital_readiness_drafts.next_milestone: Validate onboarding improvements with the next three pilots.

capital_readiness_drafts.readiness_rationale: Customer signal is strengthening, but the company still needs cleaner proof before a capital process.
capital_readiness_drafts.next_milestone: Convert onboarding lessons into a repeatable activation flow.

support_routing_drafts.route_recommendation: Route product onboarding support before capital introductions.
support_routing_drafts.route_rationale: Customer signal is improving, but onboarding friction still blocks cleaner activation evidence.

milestone_drafts.milestone_statement: Validate onboarding improvements with the next three pilots.
milestone_drafts.milestone_rationale: This is the next internal milestone before the company can support a stronger capital-readiness discussion.

strengths: Customer pain is becoming more consistent across early interviews.
top_gaps: Need reviewed repeat-usage and retention evidence.
Onboarding still depends on manual support.
evidence_improving: Customer pain statements are now repeated across three pilots.
recommended_next_actions: Tighten onboarding flow and capture activation evidence.
Collect repeat-usage proof from current pilots.
founder_report.capital_readiness_summary: Capital readiness remains a draft view only. Customer signal is improving, but the company still needs cleaner reviewed proof before a capital path discussion.

current_strengths: Customer pain is clearer across multiple interviews.
stuck_reasons: Onboarding still creates manual support load.
internal_report.recommended_support_route: Product onboarding support and retention instrumentation.
internal_report.milestone_status: Customer signal improving; activation proof incomplete.
internal_notes: Do not route to investor-facing work until product-risk evidence is reviewed.
